query:
SELECT
                    `c`.`id` AS `comic_id`,
                    COUNT(`i`.`id`) AS `cast_count`
                FROM `Comic` `c`
                JOIN `Occurrence` `o` ON `c`.`id` = `o`.`comic_id`
                JOIN `Item` `i` ON `o`.`item_id` = `i`.`id`
                WHERE `i`.`type` = 'cast'
                GROUP BY `c`.`id`
                ORDER BY `cast_count` DESC
                LIMIT 25
